description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use four jobs to build on different environments: build-linux on ubuntu-20.04, build-windows on windows-latest, build-emscripten on ubuntu-20.04 with emsdk, and build-macos on macos-latest. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, then build using cmake.
